note: Hand signal for right turn (indicators failed) per PDR 9.3 = right arm extended OR left arm bent up. Sources (green-way, vodiy) describe figure 1 = right-turn signal (correct), figure 2 = left-turn, figure 3 = stop. So 'На першому' = index 1. Stored answer was 3 ('На третьому', the stop figure) = wrong; alt_read=1 matches official.
